title: tanacetum alpinum var. cuneatum
intro: Tanacetum alpinum var. cuneatum, also known as Alpine Tansy, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to high mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Alpine Tansy include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Alpine Tansy can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its health benefits.
